output:
## Crew Assignment

**Alex → Engineer**
- Holds a Naval Engineering degree
- Regularly solves complex technical issues on the yacht
- Passionate about vessel mechanics in his free time

**Donnie → Deckhand**
- Years of direct experience as a deckhand on other ships
- Skilled in rigging, safety procedures, and maintenance — core deckhand tasks
- Mechanical background (car mechanic) supports hands-on deck work

**Emily → Neither role (hospitality/people-facing duties)**
- She explicitly prefers tasks involving people and hospitality
- Struggles with complex technical diagrams (rules out engineer)
- Can handle basic deckhand tasks but lacks enthusiasm and depth
- Assigning her to either technical role would place her alongside crew members she has friction with, hurting team efficiency

This also keeps Alex and Donnie — who have strong rapport and proven teamwork under pressure — in the two critical operational roles, maximizing coordination where it matters most.
